programs.title: Verano en diciembre
programs.desc: Four generations of women meet in Madrid at a convention organized by Teresa.She is accompanied by four daughters in their thirties, a granddaughter and her 95-year-old mother-in-law, who suffers from dementia.

programs.title: Oscar's Eye
programs.desc: Nine-year-old Oscar cannot speak.Because of this, he is rejected and bullied by his peers.However, he becomes friends with the owner of the workshop, Eric, with whom he shares a common passion - photography.

programs.title: Frieda's Case
programs.desc: The year 1904. A seamstress accused of a crime becomes the center of a trial that exposes the injustices of the legal system.

programs.title: Veep 2
programs.desc: Further adventures of the Vice President of the United States, whose ideas about politics collide with brutal reality.Selina Meyer (Julia Louis-Dreyfus) has become familiar with her many responsibilities and is becoming more and more confident in moving around Washington.Loyal colleagues - chief of staff Amy Brookheimer (Anna Chlumsky), press secretary Mike McLintock (Matt Walsh), adviser Gary Walsh (Tony Hale) and personal assistant Sue Wilson (Sufe Bradshaw) - help her cope with the hostile environment in the White House.The series, an interesting combination of intelligent comedy and political fiction, was nominated for an Emmy in 2012.

programs.title: Veep 2
programs.desc: Further adventures of the Vice President of the United States, whose ideas about politics collide with brutal reality.Selina Meyer (Julia Louis-Dreyfus) has become familiar with her many responsibilities and is becoming more and more confident in moving around Washington.Loyal colleagues - chief of staff Amy Brookheimer (Anna Chlumsky), press secretary Mike McLintock (Matt Walsh), adviser Gary Walsh (Tony Hale) and personal assistant Sue Wilson (Sufe Bradshaw) - help her cope with the hostile environment in the White House.The series, an interesting combination of intelligent comedy and political fiction, was nominated for an Emmy in 2012.

programs.title: Tripped Up
programs.desc: Lizzy (Leah Lewis) has always dreamed of becoming a chef.However, participating in a culinary reality show and later working in a New York restaurant became a source of frustration for her.A cooking enthusiast is one step away from giving up her greatest passion.The last chance to stay in the catering industry is to participate in a culinary festival.Together with her friends, Mary (Ashley Moore), Kai (Ariel Winter) and Taylor (Sasha Fox), she sets off on an adventure.If she fails, she is ready to look for another path in life.Unfortunately, the team has been plagued by bad luck since the beginning of the expedition.
